mentions.surface: scripsit ad me diligenter Sicca de Silio
scripsit ad me diligenter Sicca de Silio
reliquae pecuniae vel usuram Silio pendemus
dum a Faberio vel cum aliquo qui Faberio debet repraesentabimus
Sicca has written to me carefully about Silius
Sicca has written to me carefully about Silius
For Silius will not want luxury holdings
You will press six hundred thousand sesterces out of Hermogenes
we shall either pay Silius interest
until we can settle in full from Faberius or from someone who owes Faberius
To Drusus's gardens, however, I much prefer it
